text: The second half of this verse is not found in the Hebrew text; the Septuagint Greek gives it immediately after verse 12 of ch. 9.
vv. 8, 10. The second half of either verse is the same in the original.

vv. 6, 11. In the Hebrew text, both verses end with the same formula, which the Latin interprets in verse 6 ‘iniquity covers the mouth of the godless’ and in verse 11 ‘the mouth of the godless covers iniquity’.
